action.reasoning: Observation: 25-epoch training completed with best val_loss=0.003295, still decreasing at epoch 24. Masked_r2=0.5213 vs previous best eval 0.5206. 10 features masked in zero_mask. Analysis: Model hasn't converged - more epochs should help. The slow convergence (~40s/epoch) means 50 more epochs would take ~33 min. Decision: Submit current best checkpoint for eval to measure actual mean_r2, then train longer next iteration.
